title: eragrostis boinensis
intro: Eragrostis boinensis, also known as the Boin's love grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Eragrostis boinensis are said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Eragrostis boinensis include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve digestive health. In terms of herbal preparations, Eragrostis boinensis can be consumed as a tea, added to soups, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
